items.title: Plane and fire-rescue truck collide at LaGuardia Airport, 2 pilots killed
items.standfirst: Two pilots were killed and dozens of people injured at New York's LaGuardia Airport late Sunday night when an arriving Air Canada Express plane and fire and rescue vehicle collided, authorities said.
items.content: Two pilots were killed and dozens of people injured at New York's LaGuardia Airport late Sunday night when an arriving Air Canada Express plane and fire and rescue vehicle collided, authorities said.

items.title: Pilot, co-pilot killed in runway collision at New York airport
items.standfirst: The pilot and co-pilot of an Air Canada Express plane that collided with a ground vehicle at New York’s LaGuardia Airport have died, NBC News reported on Monday. The plane with 76 people on board collided with a fire truck while landing at the airport, in an incident that led to the airport's closure, authorities said.
items.content: The pilot and co-pilot of an Air Canada Express plane that collided with a ground vehicle at New York’s LaGuardia Airport have died, NBC News reported on Monday. The plane with 76 people on board collided with a fire truck while landing at the airport, in an incident that led to the airport's closure, authorities said.

items.title: Plane collides with firefighting truck at New York City's LaGuardia airport
items.standfirst: A passenger plane collided with a Port authority firefighting truck in New York City's LaGuardia airport, severely damaging the nose of the aircraft. The two pilots have died and over 40 passengers went rushed to the hospital with injuries. The incident grounded all traffic at the airport, which then closed down.
items.content: A passenger plane collided with a Port authority firefighting truck in New York City's LaGuardia airport, severely damaging the nose of the aircraft. The two pilots have died and over 40 passengers went rushed to the hospital with injuries. The incident grounded all traffic at the airport, which then closed down.

items.title: Pilot and co-pilot killed after Air Canada jet collision at LaGuardia New York
items.standfirst: Nine people hospitalised and airport closed after landing plane hits fire truck responding to separate incidentThe pilot and co-pilot of an Air Canada Express regional jet have been killed after it collided with a fire truck while landing at New York’s LaGuardia airport, in an incident that closed the airport.The collision also caused serious injuries with nine people in hospital. It happened as a firefighting vehicle was responding to a separate incident, according to the Port Authority of New York and New Jersey, which runs the airport. Continue reading...

clusters.title: 'The key' for 2027 French presidential race will be party alliances
clusters.neutral_headline: French far-right fails to win key cities

items.title: 'The key' for 2027 French presidential race will be party alliances
items.standfirst: France's far-right National Rally (RN) failed to win control of any major ​city in Sunday's nationwide municipal election, a setback that gave hope to embattled mainstream parties ahead of next year's presidential election. Meanwhile, the socialist party won the vote in Paris and Marseille. But what does it mean for the 2027 presidential election? FRANCE 24's Marc Perelman takes a look.
items.content: France's far-right National Rally (RN) failed to win control of any major ​city in Sunday's nationwide municipal election, a setback that gave hope to embattled mainstream parties ahead of next year's presidential election. Meanwhile, the socialist party won the vote in Paris and Marseille. But what does it mean for the 2027 presidential election? FRANCE 24's Marc Perelman takes a look.

items.title: Marseille sticks with the left as far-right fails to convince in local elections
items.standfirst: Marine Le Pen's nationalist eurosceptic party lost out in big target cities including Marseille and Toulon. The only win has been through its ally, Eric Ciotti who in Nice, France's fifth-largest city. The municipal votes ​were a test of ‌both the depth of the far right's support base a year ahead of presidential elections to replace centrist Emmanuel Macron, and ⁠the resilience of mainstream parties in a fragmented political landscape. FRANCE 24's Clovis Casali tells us more from Marseille.
items.content: Marine Le Pen's nationalist eurosceptic party lost out in big target cities including Marseille and Toulon. The only win has been through its ally, Eric Ciotti who in Nice, France's fifth-largest city. The municipal votes ​were a test of ‌both the depth of the far right's support base a year ahead of presidential elections to replace centrist Emmanuel Macron, and ⁠the resilience of mainstream parties in a fragmented political landscape. FRANCE 24's Clovis Casali tells us more from Marseille.

items.title: French far-right fail to take key cities in test for 2027 presidential race
items.standfirst: Despite predictions, French far-right party the National Rally failed to take over any major cities in the municipal elections, in a ballot considered to be a stress-test ahead of the 2027 presidential race. But overall, the results do not give any further clue as to who could succeed to President Emmanuel Macron. FRANCE 24's James André tells us more about what to know.
items.content: Despite predictions, French far-right party the National Rally failed to take over any major cities in the municipal elections, in a ballot considered to be a stress-test ahead of the 2027 presidential race. But overall, the results do not give any further clue as to who could succeed to President Emmanuel Macron. FRANCE 24's James André tells us more about what to know.

items.title: French left wins over country's largest cities in municipal election
items.standfirst: Franc has brought in its new generation of mayors, in a local election that was held with the 2027 presidential election in mind. The left succeeded in major cities including Paris, Lyon and Marseille but failed to conquer Toulouse. On the other hand, Nice swung to the far right.
items.content: Franc has brought in its new generation of mayors, in a local election that was held with the 2027 presidential election in mind. The left succeeded in major cities including Paris, Lyon and Marseille but failed to conquer Toulouse. On the other hand, Nice swung to the far right.

items.title: France's Socialists hold on to power in major cities in election boost for mainstream
items.standfirst: Paris and Marseille are held by the Socialists in local elections which saw the nationalist right win in Nice and certain towns.
items.content: Paris and Marseille are held by the Socialists in local elections which saw the nationalist right win in Nice and certain towns.

ai_summary: Far-right party fails to win major cities
Socialists win in Paris and Marseille
Municipal elections seen as test for 2027
French politics fragmented ahead of election
Mainstream parties resilient in local elections

clusters.title: Scotland becomes first part of UK to screen newborns for spinal muscular atrophy
clusters.neutral_headline: Scotland screens newborns for spinal muscular atrophy

items.title: Scotland becomes first part of UK to screen newborns for spinal muscular atrophy
items.standfirst: Hope Scottish pilot will result in heel prick test for rare genetic condition being approved across BritainScotland has become the first part of the UK to screen newborn babies for spinal muscular atrophy (SMA), a rare genetic condition that causes progressive muscle wastage.Campaigners, who have long advocated for newborn testing because early detection is critical for treatment outcomes, hope the Scottish pilot will result in approval for the heel prick test across the UK. Continue reading...
items.content: Hope Scottish pilot will result in heel prick test for rare genetic condition being approved across BritainScotland has become the first part of the UK to screen newborn babies for spinal muscular atrophy (SMA), a rare genetic condition that causes progressive muscle wastage.Campaigners, who have long advocated for newborn testing because early detection is critical for treatment outcomes, hope the Scottish pilot will result in approval for the heel prick test across the UK. Continue reading...

items.title: Scotland becomes first in UK to test newborns for rare genetic condition
items.standfirst: Spinal Muscular Atrophy (SMA) causes progressive muscle weakness and, without treatment, can limit life expectancy to just two years.

clusters.title: Israel strikes key bridge in south Lebanon, stoking fears of ground invasion
clusters.neutral_headline: Israel strikes key bridge in south Lebanon

items.title: Israel strikes key bridge in south Lebanon, stoking fears of ground invasion
items.standfirst: Israeli forces destroyed bridges they said were used by Hezbollah to cross the key Litani river, north of the border. The attack has sparked concern that a large-scale Israeli ground invasion could be in the works, with the Lebanese president calling the bombing 'collective punishment' and 'a flagrant violation of sovereignty'. FRANCE 24's Claire Paccalin tells us more from one of the destroyed bridges in Qâsmiyé.
items.content: Israeli forces destroyed bridges they said were used by Hezbollah to cross the key Litani river, north of the border. The attack has sparked concern that a large-scale Israeli ground invasion could be in the works, with the Lebanese president calling the bombing 'collective punishment' and 'a flagrant violation of sovereignty'. FRANCE 24's Claire Paccalin tells us more from one of the destroyed bridges in Qâsmiyé.

items.title: Why is Israel targeting Lebanon's bridges?
items.standfirst: Israeli forces have been instructed to destroy the crossings over the Litani river that were being used by Hezbollah to send reinforcements.
items.content: Israeli forces have been instructed to destroy the crossings over the Litani river that were being used by Hezbollah to send reinforcements.

clusters.title: Socialist Emmanuel Grégoire elected Paris mayor, as National Rally fails to take key cities

items.title: Socialist Emmanuel Grégoire elected Paris mayor, as National Rally fails to take key cities
items.standfirst: City hall veteran beats rightwinger Rachida Dati in French capital, while far-right RN fails to win Marseille and Toulon in French local electionsThe Socialist Emmanuel Grégoire has been elected mayor of Paris, beating the former rightwing minister Rachida Dati, with Marine Le Pen’s far-right, anti-immigration National Rally (RN) failing to take key cities targeted in Sunday’s second round of local elections.Grégoire took a victory bike ride with future councillors in Paris on Sunday night to show that the French capital would continue its pro-cycling and environmental policies. Continue reading...

items.title: Emmanuel Grégoire elected Paris mayor, succeeding fellow left-winger Anne Hidalgo
items.standfirst: Socialist frontrunner Emmanuel Grégoire comfortably defeated veteran conservative Rachida Dati in a second-round runoff for Paris mayor on Sunday, defying forecasts of a close race to extend the left's quarter-century rule in the French capital.
items.content: Socialist frontrunner Emmanuel Grégoire comfortably defeated veteran conservative Rachida Dati in a second-round runoff for Paris mayor on Sunday, defying forecasts of a close race to extend the left's quarter-century rule in the French capital.
